title: It is + adj. + for/of sb. + to V
formula_for_zh: 做某事（對某人來說）是⋯⋯的
formula_of_zh: 某人做某事是⋯⋯的（評價人格特質）

explanation.for: for 用於描述某件事對某人而言的難易度、重要性或必要性，著重於「事情本身的性質」。形容詞描述的是不定詞所代表的動作，而非 for 後面的人。
explanation.of: of 用於描述某人做了某件事所展現出的品格或特質，著重於「人的特質」。形容詞直接描述 of 後面那個人的個人特質或行為表現。

examples.sentence: It is important for students to review their notes every day.
examples.template: It is ___ for students to review their notes every day.
parts: for students to review their notes every day.
examples.translation: 學生每天複習筆記是很重要的。

examples.sentence: It is difficult for beginners to master a new language quickly.
examples.template: It is ___ for beginners to master a new language quickly.
parts: for beginners to master a new language quickly.
examples.translation: 對初學者來說，快速精通一門新語言是很困難的。

examples.sentence: It is very kind of you to help me carry these heavy boxes.
examples.template: It is very ___ of you to help me carry these heavy boxes.
parts: of you to help me carry these heavy boxes.
examples.translation: 你幫我搬這些重箱子真的很好心。

examples.sentence: It is careless of Tom to forget his umbrella on such a rainy day.
examples.template: It is ___ of Tom to forget his umbrella on such a rainy day.
parts: of Tom to forget his umbrella on such a rainy day.
examples.translation: Tom 在這麼下雨的天氣還忘記帶傘，真的很粗心。

extension.title: 延伸學習：判斷用 for 還是 of
extension.tip: 判斷技巧：把形容詞套用到人身上。如果句子合理，就用 of；如果不合理，就用 for。

examples.result: → 用 of：It is kind of him to do that.
→ 用 for：It is important for him to do that.

extension.note: 口訣：形容詞若能直接描述「人」的特質，用 of；若描述的是「事情」的性質，用 for。
